response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The vocal audio perfectly matches the Japanese reference lyrics of the song 'Motteke! Sailor Fuku'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics from the reference JSON to ensure correct transcribing of the rapid-fire speech. 3. Timing & Pacing: Added a visual subtitle for the 'CCGG Theater' card before the song started. Applied precise start/end timings to match the energetic, fast-paced vocal segments.

subtitles.original: CCGG 劇場
subtitles.english: [Title: CCGG Theater]

subtitles.original: 曖昧3センチ そりゃぷにってコトかい? ちょっ!
subtitles.english: 3 ambiguous centimeters, does that mean it's squishy? Wait!

subtitles.original: らっぴんぐが制服...だぁぁ不利ってこたない ぷ。
subtitles.english: Wrapping it in a uniform... there's no way that's a disadvantage, hah.

subtitles.original: がんばっちゃ? やっちゃっちゃ
subtitles.english: Shall we do our best? Let's do it!

subtitles.original: そんときゃーっち&Release ぎョッ
subtitles.english: At that moment, catch and release, whoa!

subtitles.original: 汗(Fuu)々(Fuu)の谷間に
subtitles.english: In the sweaty valley...

subtitles.original: Darlin’ darlin’ F R E E Z E!!
subtitles.english: Darling, darling, FREEZE!

subtitles.original: なんかダるー なんかデるー あいしテるー
subtitles.english: Feeling kind of lazy, something's coming out, I love you!

subtitles.original: あれ一個が違ってるんるー
subtitles.english: Huh, that one thing is different!

subtitles.original: なやみン坊ー 高鉄棒ー
subtitles.english: Worried kid, high bar...

subtitles.original: おいしん簿ー
subtitles.english: Gourmet journal...

subtitles.original: いーかげんにシナサイ
subtitles.english: Stop fooling around!

subtitles.original: 飛んでったアイツの火照るカラダって
subtitles.english: They say his flying, flushed body...

subtitles.original: 所謂ふつーのおにゃのコ
subtitles.english: is just that of a normal girl.

subtitles.original: 驚いたあたしだけ?
subtitles.english: Am I the only one who's surprised?

subtitles.original: 豚骨ハリガネおかわりだだだ
subtitles.english: Another bowl of tonkotsu ramen with extra-firm noodles!

subtitles.original: BON-BON おーえん団
subtitles.english: Bon-bon cheer squad!

subtitles.original: Let’s get! チェリーパイ
subtitles.english: Let's get! Cherry pie!

subtitles.original: RAN-RAN かんげー会
subtitles.english: Ran-ran welcome party!

subtitles.original: Look up! せんせーしょん
subtitles.english: Look up! Sensation!
